description: Case style: Black round caseDial style: Grey dial with silver and white coloured hands  Strap style: Steel strap with butterfly clasp Features: Three dials on face, branding on the 3 hour mark, a screw to reset time, tachymeter, buttons at side for stopwatch application and date aperture at the 3 hour mark  Waterproof to 3 ATM, wearable around sinks and in mild rains Warranty:  1 year
